para_trans: GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: Narrow-2024 / P.No.58 / P.S.-3,
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Reference: - GOVERNMENT ORDER NO.: ASC-1523 / Q.No. 107 / PRASH-3, dated 7th March 2024.
Disabled in the Ad-hoc Selection List of the Year 2023-2024 for promotion to the post of Assistant Cell Officer
Helpline by order of reference date 07.03.2024 to Mr.N.R.Dodke on qualifying from the category
The officer has been given an ad-hoc promotion to the rank of Food, Civil Supplies and Consumer Protection.
A post has been created in the department.
2. The certificate on which Mr. Dodke has been granted the benefit of disability is invalid.
The authority concerned has been informed. For this reason, Mr. N.R.Dodke. of 07.03.2024
Cancellation of ad-hoc promotion to the post of Assistant Room Officer from the Divyang category under the order.
The Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
